title: Audit Log Entry
description: Single entry in the append-only audit log (provenance.jsonl). Cryptographically chained — each entry includes the hash of the previous entry.

spec_version.description: Version of the spec governing this action

action.description: What was done (e.g. pipeline_run, review, intel_scan, spec_improvement)

program.description: Program slug if action is program-scoped

input_hash.description: Hash of the input data for reproducibility

output_type.description: Type of output (run_json, review, intel_report, etc.)

trust_level.description: Agent trust level at time of action (1=human reviews all, 2=exceptions only, 3=autonomous)

prior_hash.description: Hash of the previous entry (genesis for first entry)

entry_hash.description: Hash of this entry for chain verification
